# SL-INDEX-012: yandex-indexable-url-not-searchable

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate-rule-docs.mjs. Do not edit by hand. -->

## Summary

Yandex reports that an indexable route is not searchable.

## Metadata

- Category: Indexability (indexability)
- Default severity: error
- Confidence: certain
- Scope: page
- Provider scope: yandex
- Version: 1.0.0

## Evidence Sources

- yandex

## Required Evidence

- route-contract
- yandex-observation
- observed-at
- fetched-at

## When This Triggers

Compare route contract with latest Yandex searchable state.

## False Positives

False positives are usually caused by stale or sampled external observations.
Check the observation date, freshness, and provider payload before suppressing.

## How To Fix

Review Yandex exclusion reason and fix crawl, canonical, or indexing blockers.

## Examples

Bad-case fixture reference:

- fixtures/indexability/yandex-not-searchable

Fixed direction:

- Review Yandex exclusion reason and fix crawl, canonical, or indexing blockers.

The generated documentation does not invent HTML, DSL, source locations,
selectors, or external observations beyond the catalog fixture references above.

## Implementation Surfaces

- Yandex integration must provide dated, freshness-aware observations before
  this rule can use Yandex evidence.
